nodes.name: Raise requisition (lines, budget soft-check)
nodes.documentation: Requester creates a requisition: header (auto identifier, date, requester+department auto, category {Items|Spares|Services|ProductDesign}, direct/indirect, purchase type {Local|Import}, priority {ASAP|SameDay|Within2Days|Within1Week}, currency, project/cost-center) and one or more lines (item [search master or free-text -> auto-create], quantity >0, UoM, unit price, need date, product-used-for, available stock, line note, attachments). On submit, a soft budget check warns if over available; auto identifier generated; sees only own/department requisitions. [SCOR S1.1/O2 | ISO 7.5 | source: AB fields + RA structure]

nodes.name: Approve through stages (auto or manual)
nodes.documentation: Each stage: within auto-approval threshold -> system auto-approves (nearest-bucket approver, logged); else the requested approver (or qualified assignee, never own requisition) approves or returns for revision. SoD enforced. [SCOR OE2 | source: RA auto-approval + AB FM/head as config]

nodes.name: Revise and resubmit
nodes.documentation: Requester edits the same requisition per the rejection note (identifier unchanged) and resubmits. [source: both]

nodes.name: Source: RFQ, compare landed cost, select, award
nodes.documentation: Buyer sources: prequalify/discover suppliers, float RFQ to >=3 (email+OTP form), capture structured quotes (price, payment terms, delivery terms, incoterm, charges), negotiate, compare on normalized landed cost + scorecard, select (justify non-top pick), award + capture contract terms. Repeat/preferred buys bypass via framework call-off. [SCOR S1.2-S1.10 | source: AB depth + RA mechanics]

nodes.name: Onboard / qualify supplier (if new)
nodes.documentation: A new supplier completes onboarding (profile, addresses, tax, qualification docs: certs/COA/AVL, risk/security/ESG attributes) and is approved before any order. Gates ordering. [SCOR S1.6 | ISO 8.4.1 + family | source: RA lifecycle + AB qualification]

nodes.name: Issue PO (budget commit, terms, PDF)
nodes.documentation: Buyer issues the PO from requisition+quote: budget HARD-committed (encumbrance), incoterms/scope/currency+exchange rate, T&Cs, delivery place/date, tax on lines, ISO doc ref; emitted as PDF to the supplier. Editable until first receipt (qty tolerance). Buyer cannot approve own PO (SoD). [SCOR S2.1 | ISO 8.4.3 | source: AB + commit build-new]

nodes.name: Acknowledge PO
nodes.documentation: Supplier acknowledges the PO before production; any advance payment triggers here per the schedule. [SCOR S2.1 | source: both]

nodes.name: Receive, inspect (GRN), QC gate
nodes.documentation: Receiving records delivery (partial-delivery blocks; transport-mode + customs tracking for import). Materials -> COA+sample to QC -> QC approves (hard block if no COA) -> GRN raised, GR/IR accrued; qty tolerance +/-5-10% amends PO first. Spares/services -> Engineering receives, closes requisition (no GRN). [SCOR S2.4/S2.5/S2.6 | ISO 8.6/8.7 | source: AB QC + RA blocks]

nodes.name: Raise NCR -> RMA / CAPA loop
nodes.documentation: NCR (item, delivery-note no., date, % non-conformance, image) by QC/FM/requester -> handler resolves with supplier -> return (S4) and/or corrective action -> effectiveness review -> feeds supplier scorecard + may SUSPEND supplier. [SCOR S4 | ISO 8.6->8.7->10.2->8.4.1 | source: build-new]

nodes.name: Capture invoice, two/three-way match
nodes.documentation: Invoice captured (with documents). Match: three-way (PO+GRN+invoice) for materials, two-way (PO+invoice) for services/no-GRN; within price/qty tolerance + tax-inclusive -> auto-clear and relieve GR/IR; else exception (price/qty/missing-GR/duplicate-invoice/tax-mismatch) routed to resolver -> accept/adjust/credit-note/debit-note/reject. [SCOR S2.7 | ISO 8.6 | source: build-new + AB package]

nodes.name: Schedule and process payment (installments)
nodes.documentation: Finance-Maker builds the payment schedule per terms {100% advance | part-advance+against-docs | part-advance+against-shipment | 30/70 | net 30/60/90}; approves installments full or partial (+remainder), processes with receipt, handles advance recoupment + retention, cash float for cash buys, withholding tax. Overdue reminder ~28d. [SCOR S2.7 | source: RA installments + AB terms]

nodes.name: Approve payment release (checker)
nodes.documentation: Finance-Checker (Chief Accountant) reviews and approves the prepared payment before release; maker != checker (financial-control SoD per SOX/COSO + ISO 37001, NOT ISO 9001). Reschedule with reason if held. [source: both, segregation]

nodes.name: Management final approval (terminal vertical)
nodes.documentation: Management is the terminal vertical in the approval chain; it gives final sign-off, frequently exercised through approving the final payment installment release. Marks the Management completion APPROVED, the last gate before the COMPLETED guard. [SCOR OE1 (Supply Chain Strategy) / S2.7 | source: RA MANAGEMENT vertical]

nodes.name: Configure masters, roles, approval chain, budgets, tax
nodes.documentation: Admin pre-seeds before any transaction: master data (items, suppliers, UoM, currencies, warehouses, payment terms, projects/cost-centers, categories/segments, tax codes), users + roles + designations + business units (RBAC), the configurable approval chain + routing rules, budgets per cost-center x period, and the dynamic field config. Without routing rules and budgets, downstream routing and commitment fail. [SCOR OE2/OE4/OE5/OE11 | source: blueprint+RA build-new]

nodes.name: Route into configurable approval chain
nodes.documentation: System resolves the approval chain by department/category/value, creates one completion per stage (NOT_STARTED), assigns the first stage (Requester pinned), least-loaded approver selected. [SCOR OE2 | ISO 8.4 | source: RA engine]

nodes.name: Manufacture, ship, share documents
nodes.documentation: Supplier manufactures and ships; shares documents after dispatch (invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, AWB/BL, and for import: Bayan after arrival, health cert for food, DG declaration). [SCOR S2.2/S2.3 | source: AB import docs]

nodes.name: Close out, update analytics + audit
nodes.documentation: Cycle closes when stage = POST_DELIVERY, all approvals APPROVED, all matches cleared, payments settled, no open NCR/CAPA block. Commitment relieved to actual; supplier scorecard (OTIF/perfect-order, quality, cost, responsiveness), cycle-time, savings, spend analytics updated; audit log + SSE emitted throughout. [SCOR OE3 + RL/RS/CO | ISO 8.4.1 | source: both + KPIs]

nodes.name: Within budget or override?
nodes.documentation: Soft budget gate. If requisition value <= cost-center available budget -> proceeds. If over -> Budget Owner must approve an override (logged) or the requisition is revised. Hard commit happens later at PO issue. [SCOR OE11 | source: build-new finance control]

nodes.name: Approved?
nodes.documentation: Approved -> sourcing. Rejected -> return-for-revision loop to the requester with mandatory note. [source: both]

nodes.name: QC pass?
nodes.documentation: Pass -> GRN + onward. Fail -> non-conformance (NCR) raised, disposition (return/rework/concession/scrap), may start RMA + CAPA loop feeding supplier re-evaluation. [SCOR S2.5 | ISO 8.7/10.2 | source: AB NCR + build-new CAPA]

nodes.name: Setup begins
nodes.documentation: Administrator setup precedes any transaction. [SCOR OE | source: blueprint]

nodes.name: Need identified
nodes.documentation: A requester in any department identifies a purchase need (material, spare, service, or product-design item). Trigger for the cycle. [SCOR S1.1 Define Business Need | source: AB+RA]

nodes.name: Source-to-pay complete
nodes.documentation: Fully recorded, benchmark-traceable cycle. [source: build-new]
